title: Vertex Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
note: Provides 2025 revenue, product revenue mix, operating income, and CASGEVY revenue disclosure.

title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals 2025 Form 10-K
note: Annual filing used for business overview, risk context, product portfolio, and 2025 financial scale.

title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Market Capitalization
note: Canonical registry market-cap URL for Vertex.

title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Stock Price & Overview
note: Used for refreshed market capitalization, PE ratio, ticker, sector, and IPO date reference; IPO market cap was not supported, so maybeIpo remains null.

title: DailyMed TRIKAFTA Prescribing Information
note: Authoritative labeling source for TRIKAFTA indication and eligible cystic fibrosis patient population.

title: CASGEVY
note: FDA product page identifying Vertex as manufacturer and CASGEVY indications for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia.

title: FDA Approves First Gene Therapies to Treat Patients with Sickle Cell Disease
note: Documents CASGEVY as a cell-based CRISPR/Cas9 gene therapy and the first FDA-approved therapy using that genome-editing technology.

title: Six Laws of Open Source Drug Discovery
note: Explains open-source drug discovery collaboration practices and constraints used to evaluate upstream disruption concepts.

title: An open-source drug discovery platform enables ultra-large virtual screens
note: Supports VirtualFlow as an open-source enabling platform for large-scale computational drug discovery.

title: Conducting Clinical Trials With Decentralized Elements Guidance
note: Provides regulatory context for decentralized clinical-trial elements, remote participation, and evidence-generation constraints.

title: The Linux Foundation Hosts Project to Decentralize and Accelerate Drug Development for Rare Genetic Diseases
note: Source for OpenTreatments and its open-governance, patient-led rare genetic disease treatment development model.
